name: Carbon Black
description: Monitor VMware Carbon Black endpoint protection and device security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Carbon Black Cloud console
2. Go to Settings > API Access
3. Create a Custom Access Level with Device read permissions
4. Create an API Key with that access level
5. Copy the API Secret Key and API ID (format: SECRET/ID)
6. Copy your Org Key from the same page
7. Enter your API URL, Org Key, and API Token below

credentialFields.label: API URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Carbon Black Cloud API URL (e.g. https://defense.conferdeploy.net). Found in Settings > API Access.

credentialFields.label: Org Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Carbon Black Cloud org key (found in Settings > API Access > API Keys)

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Your API Secret Key / API ID combined (format: SECRET_KEY/API_ID)

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies Carbon Black endpoints are registered and protected

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists all endpoints managed by Carbon Black for device inventory
